# en-stepper



<!-- Auto Generated Below -->


## Overview

Indicador de progresso para fluxos de onboarding.

## Properties

| Property      | Attribute      | Description                    | Type            | Default |
| ------------- | -------------- | ------------------------------ | --------------- | ------- |
| `currentStep` | `current-step` | Índice do passo atual (base 0) | `number`        | `0`     |
| `steps`       | --             | Lista de passos                | `StepperStep[]` | `[]`    |


## Events

| Event          | Description | Type                  |
| -------------- | ----------- | --------------------- |
| `enStepChange` |             | `CustomEvent<number>` |
